capabilities.summary: Framework-managed external_test_runner executor: the loop starts the app, runs the adopter spec-runner (fixed argv, shell=False), captures exit code + JSON report + trace + screenshots + logs, and cleans up — no human runs the runner.

Framework-generated fail-closed execution provenance: in-flight nonce + start/end audit-spine window + run-provenance.json, verified before Acceptance spawns; a hand-authored or stale evidence dir is refused (never trusted).

Constitution §1.7-G deterministic, facts-only, bounded, in-envelope autonomous browser_e2e remediation lane (criterion-bound executor facts -> in-envelope Dev fix -> full managed rerun -> rejudge); it never ships (the #9 human ship gate is unchanged).
Codex adapter stream-liveness probe wired into run_with_monitor so a legitimately-busy codex Acceptance/Review spawn is not false-killed by the macOS watchdog.
